scripts.build:local: npm run build:local-backend-wasm && npm run build
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build:local-backend-wasm && playwright test tests/e2e/local-first.spec.ts tests/e2e/local-projects.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:remote: npm run build:local-backend-wasm && playwright test -c playwright.remote.config.ts tests/e2e/remote-surrealdb.spec.ts tests/e2e/remote-projects.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:remote-db: npm run build:local-backend-wasm && playwright test -c playwright.remote.config.ts tests/e2e/remote-surrealdb.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:remote-project: npm run build:local-backend-wasm && playwright test -c playwright.remote.config.ts tests/e2e/remote-projects.spec.ts
